mcpServers._comment_codegraphcontext: CodeGraphContext MCP — codebase graph indexing. Provides dependency graphs, call chains, class hierarchies, and dead code detection. Install from: https://github.com/nicobailon/CodeGraphContext. Uncomment and configure the command and args below.
mcpServers._comment_codeindexmcp: code-index-mcp — semantic code search. Provides natural language search across your codebase. Install from: https://github.com/nicobailon/code-index-mcp. Uncomment and configure below.
mcpServers._comment_context7: Context7 — up-to-date documentation and code examples for libraries. Useful for checking API usage against current docs. Install from: https://github.com/nicobailon/context7-mcp. Uncomment and configure below.
mcpServers._comment_issuetracker: Issue tracker integration. Configure the MCP server for your issue tracker (JIRA, Linear, GitHub Issues, etc.) to pull ticket context into plans.
